adversary-linear — a genuinely LINEAR/CRUD package: the gate is N/A, PASS.

The CONTRACT declares only value enumerations (Role, SortOrder) and stateless
REST endpoints — no transition arrows, no lifecycle enum. extractStates finds
< 2 states, so the adversarial-depth gate is N/A and exits 0. This proves the
gate does NOT over-reach onto workflows that legitimately have no failure
machine (mirrors "no run-state ⇒ no v3 demands").

Dot-prefixed so gate-check's collectMdFiles walker skips it.
